title: How the first hour of the day changes a man of faith
caption:
How you spend the first hour is how you spend the day. Most men hand it to their feed before they've said a word to God.

One verse before one notification. Pray before you plan. Move your body before the notifications find you. Name one thing you're trusting God with, then go carry the day.

The man who starts with God rarely loses the day.

Try it for one week and see what shifts.

#faith #christianmen #thework #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #morningroutine #christianity #scripture
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
